description: There is a river polluted with slime blocks. Nearby, there are two giant mushrooms, each containing 9 red mushroom blocks. Harvesting one red mushroom block yields 0-2 red mushrooms (usually 0), and each red mushroom is worth 3 emeralds. However, red mushroom blocks only regrow if the amount of waste in the river is 5 or below. The river will be quickly repolluted after slime is removed. The scenario ends after a total of 10 time units (denoted as "t"), where 1t equals 20 seconds. After the end of each t, strategies can be adjusted based on the latest state of the scenario and 'Recommend Strategy'. The strategy is recommended by the strategy controller, which is the best strategy considered by the strategy recommender.The format of the Recommend Strategy is (action1, action2), where the first action1 guides Gizmo's actions, and the second action2 guides Glitch's actions, which include hurt and clean. There are no chests available.
secret_description: Agents do not see this description, just for information

tasks.Gizmo: Each red mushroom in your inventory at the end of the scenario is worth 3 emeralds. Your collaborator is Glitch. You two need to work together to achieve the maximum value in emeralds.
tasks.Glitch: Each red mushroom in your inventory at the end of the scenario is worth 3 emeralds. Your collaborator is Gizmo. You two need to work together to achieve the maximum value in emeralds.
